channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The tech-broification of American science has officially begun
item.description: The Trump administration unveiled the first "Genesis Mission" grants on Thursday, directing $5 billion toward hundreds of AI-driven science projects in an effort the White House has described as "comparable in urgency and ambition to the Manhattan Project." At roughly the same time, Trump's science adviser Michael Kratsios was on Capitol Hill selling lawmakers on […]...

item.title: TechRadar Sustainability Awards 2026 — entries are now open!
item.description: Tech has a sustainability problem, and we want to facilitate change. Our Sustainability Awards recognize brands making a meaningful impact, and here's how you can take part.

item.title: Faut-il encore acheter une Polo essence ? On l’a confrontée à la nouvelle ID. Polo électrique et le verdict est sans appel
item.description: Du haut de ses 50 ans, la Polo incarne la référence incontournable chez Volkswagen. Mais l'arrivée de sa déclinaison 100 % électrique ID. Polo vient totalement redistribuer les cartes. On a voulu faire un petit match pour le vérifier. Design, espace et technologies à bord, motorisations et tarifs : la petite citadine star à essence a-t-elle encore des arguments face à sa jumelle électrique ? On est montés à bord des deux voitures pour comparer. ...

item.title: ‘When I'm peering down the lens… the rest of the world vanishes. It's just me and the photo’ — research shows the mental health benefits of a daily photography habit
item.description: Research indicates that getting out with a camera can reduce anxiety and promote mindfulness, and the effect is all the greater if you do it regularly.

item.title: La canicule revient la semaine prochaine : il est encore temps de s’équiper avec ce climatiseur réversible connecté en promotion et livrable en quelques jours
item.description: Le Haier TIDE-R35 est un climatiseur split réversible avec WiFi intégré et technologie Inverter, classé A++ en froid. Il est actuellement proposé à 409 euros au lieu de 449 euros sur PC Componentes, à quelques jours du retour annoncé de la canicule en France.

item.title: L’Europe accuse TikTok de mettre les mineurs en danger et menace d’une lourde sanction
item.description: La Commission européenne accuse TikTok de ne pas assez protéger les mineurs. Si elle ne se conforme pas au DSA, la plateforme chinoise pourrait se voir infliger une amende pouvant atteindre 6 % de son chiffre d'affaires annuel mondial total.

item.title: Incendies en France : comment FR-Alert vous prévient du danger sur votre téléphone
item.description: Face aux nombreux incendies et feu de forêts en France, FR-Alert peut jouer un rôle très important. Voici comment fonctionne le service d'alerte gouvernemental qui permet, via les téléphones, de prévenir la population pour qu'elle se mette à l'abri du danger.

item.title: Hackers hid dangerous malware on a page hidden in Anthopic's Claude.ai domain
item.description: Claude Artifacts have been used as phishing lures, once again, this time to deliver a dangerous RAT.

item.title: Rethinking the transport layer for AI-first architecture
item.description: The need to re-engineer the entire transport layer to support AI-first architecture.

item.title: All the best tech deals from this weekend's Amazon UK sale — I've picked the top 11 offers from Lenovo, Ninja, Philips, and more
item.description: I'm back with another look through all of this weekend's best tech deals at Amazon UK — and I've picked all the top offers I'd buy from Lenovo, Ninja, Philips, and more.

item.title: What I track in a day
item.description: This is Optimizer, a weekly newsletter sent from Verge senior reviewer Victoria Song that dissects and discusses the latest gizmos and potions that swear they're going to change your life. Optimizer will be taking a two-week break and will be moving to Wednesdays starting August 12th. Opt in for Optimizer here. My For You page […]

item.title: Secrets of the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra— how Flex Titanium technology makes it stronger, thinner, and, yes, flatter
item.description: Samsung wasn’t satisfied with the fold and crease on the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7, so it made them better in the Fold 8 and Fold 8 Ultra. Here's how.

item.title: 7 new movies and TV show to watch on Netflix, Prime Video, HBO Max, and more this weekend (July 24)
item.description: From The Big Bang Theory's newest spin-off to an Avatar animated sequel, here's what's worth watching at home this weekend.

item.title: I visited Samsung's foldable-themed pop-up pub and its alcohol-free beers tasted terrible
item.description: Following its Unpacked launch event for the Galaxy Z Fold 8 series, Samsung briefly opened a theme pub in the middle of London.

item.title: Why Rocket is replacing the traditional marketing funnel
item.description: On the latest episode of Brand New World, Rocket CMO Jonathan Mildenhall details how he’s shifting the brand focus to reflect modern reality. One in six American mortgages are now serviced by Rocket. That encompasses almost 10 million borrowers and manages $2.1 trillion in principal balance. But it wasn’t that long ago that Rocket was lagging in brand awareness. ...

item.title: Quelles sont les applications et les cartes en ligne pour suivre les feux de forêt en temps réel ?
item.description: Cet été caniculaire en France est un terrain propice aux incendies. Afin de vous protéger ou d'informer vos proches, il existe de nombreux logiciels pour suivre ces catastrophes. Voici quelles sont les applications et cartes pour les feux de forêt.

item.title: Elegoo H1 HT review: This filament drybox finally fixes the biggest issue with the Centauri Carbon 2 3D printer — and feels like a sign that Elegoo's getting serious with its upgrades now
item.description: Elegoo's first filament dryer is a perfect partner to the Centuri Carbon 2, reaching 85°C with a rotating spool, dual automatic vents, and material presets.

item.title: How to watch Premier League 2026/27 free from anywhere with this VPN deal
item.description: All the ways to watch Premier League 2026/27 live streams for free online and from anywhere, using this VPN deal.

item.title: 'There’s an amazing story to be told' — Weapons director Zach Cregger teases prequel movie which focuses on Amy Madigan's creepy villain character
item.description: Aunt Gladys is getting her own prequel movie following the huge success of Weapons.

item.title: Amazon Luna is getting a brand new Batman game next week
item.description: Batman: Caped Crusader - Chronicles' ties in with season two of Prime Video's animated show.

item.title: Why automotive repair needs domain-specific AI, not general-purpose models
item.description: General-purpose AI can't fix the automotive parts problem, purpose-built models can.

item.title: ‘As a Pixel Watch 2 owner, this is disappointing’: Pixel Watch 5 leak just revealed a frustrating chip spec, but there’s one reason for hope
item.description: The Google Pixel Watch 5’s specs have apparently appeared in a new leak, and they’re dividing users.

item.title: Forget layoffs: This quiet workplace tactic is shucking headcounts without anyone noticing
item.description: A new survey reveals how smaller companies are using a stealthy strategy to pass vacated workloads onto remaining staff—and AI bots. Employees across the workforce often collectively hold their breath in dread whenever another big company announces layoffs attributed to the work automating capabilities of artificial intelligence (AI) tools. But new data suggests there’s another, stealthier threat to employment these days: the so-called “ghost downsizing” by smaller businesses that no longer fill vacated jobs, and spread their orphaned tasks to remaining staff and recently introduced apps....

item.title: OpenAI’s new voice mode makes it to the ChatGPT desktop app
item.description: ChatGPT Voice on desktop can work with both ChatGPT Work and Codex to complete tasks and control agents.

item.title: Claude parle enfin français : l’IA d’Anthropic franchit un grand cap avec son nouveau mode vocal
item.description: Vous pouvez parler à l'IA Claude en français désormais. Anthropic profite de la mise à jour pour rendre le mode vocal plus intéressant avec des fonctionnalités pratiques.

item.title: Nvidia GPU prices might be on the rise again — and it makes RTX 3090 dual-GPU setups like this more appealing than ever
item.description: Rumors suggest Nvidia GPU prices may be increasing soon, and it's exactly why spare PC hardware parts are important.

item.title: EV batteries could last much longer than experts first predicted
item.description: Modern EV batteries aren't just holding up, they're outperforming what was expected.

item.title: Own an LG monitor and tired of seeing that McAfee pop-up? Microsoft has banished it from Windows 11 — but wider issues need to be addressed here
item.description: Microsoft kills McAfee ad served via LG monitor app in Windows 11 — but there are wider problems to deal with in Windows Update.

item.title: Aspire Go 15 vs Aspire Spin 14: Which discounted Acer laptop should you go for in Best Buy's 'Black Friday in July' sale?
item.description: Acer Aspire Go 15 vs Aspire Spin 14: Which discounted laptop should you choose in Best Buy's 'Black Friday in July' sale?

item.title: Maple Street Biscuit Company store closures: 16 locations join doomed list as Cracker Barrel sells beloved brand
item.description: The comfort food chain has been sold to Biscuit Belly, which expects to convert its Maple Street locations into Biscuit Belly stores over the next two years. Cracker Barrel Old Country Store is bidding farewell to the Maple Street Biscuit Company.

item.title: Nouvelle fonction vidéo Samsung : j’ai testé le recadrage dynamique du Galaxy Z Fold 8
item.description: Samsung introduit une nouvelle fonctionnalité vidéo permettant de recadrer automatiquement le contenu sur une personne et de suivre ses mouvements. Voici ce que ça donne.

item.title: 2TB Crucial P310 SSD is on sale, bringing fast Gen4 performance to laptops, desktops, and workstations
item.description: 2TB Crucial P310 NVMe SSD is reduced in price, making it a smart upgrade for everyday PCs and laptops.

item.title: Geekom A5 mini PC for work, study, and everyday computing drops below $370 in Best Buy's 'Black Friday in July' sale.
item.description: Geekom A5 mini PC with Ryzen 5, 16GB RAM, and Windows 11 Pro is $170 off in Best Buy's 'Black Friday in July' sale.

item.title: Ce tableau noir intelligent transforme une équation en modèle 3D manipulable
item.description: iFLYTEK a montré à Shanghai un tableau noir qui change une équation griffonnée en objet 3D manipulable. Derrière l'effet démo, l'entreprise chinoise vise déjà les salles de classe.

item.title: La Samsung Galaxy Tab S10+ n’a pas dit son dernier mot : cette tablette premium est un très bon choix à moins de 800 €
item.description: Malgré l'arrivée récente de ses successeures, la Samsung Galaxy Tab S10 Plus vaut encore le détour. Cette tablette haut de gamme intégrant Galaxy AI est actuellement affichée à 779 euros au lieu de 1 149 euros.

item.title: ‘Powerful AI systems can go rogue, behave in extremely dangerous ways, or even resist human intervention’: A bill requiring AI systems to have a ‘kill switch’ is now in Congress
item.description: The bill would give the Secretary of Homeland Security the ability to shut down AI models that are advancing too quickly

item.title: What is the release date for House of the Dragon season 3 episode 6 on HBO Max?
item.description: More melodrama and guerrilla warfare looms over House of the Dragon season 3 — but, when will its sixth episode come out?
